output:
The captain's cabin.

By the end of the story, Alex had relocated the navigation charts back to the captain's cabin at twilight. Dean was aware of the charts' default location (the cabin) from the shared knowledge established early on, and he was occupied in the galley/storeroom during Alex's moves — with no indication he witnessed the intermediate move to the main deck. Either way, the charts ended up back in the cabin, which is both their last actual location and the location Dean would expect them to be.
